headline: Unilever Announces Historic Palm Oil Policy: Zero-Deforestation Supplier Cut-Off and €80M Brazilian Reforestation Foundation.
summary: Unilever PLC has announced an industry-first commitment: all suppliers linked to palm oil deforestation will be removed from the supply chain by December 2026. Simultaneously, Unilever launches the 'Unilever Amazon Restoration Foundation' with an €80M initial endowment to fund reforestation of degraded rainforest in the Amazon basin.

headline: NNPA Launches To Promote Biodiversity Awareness
summary:
A new national platform aimed at showcasing Nigeria's rich natural heritage and promoting biodiversity awareness through photography has been launched with the unveiling of the Nigeria Nature Photography Awards (NNPA).

headline: Initiative To Showcase Nigeria's Biodiversity, Natural Heritage Through Photography
summary:
Nigeria Nature Photography Awards (NNPA) has introduced a platform aimed at celebrating and documenting Nigeria's biodiversity, wildlife, and natural landscapes through photography.

headline: Centring Human Rights in Ecosystem-based Adaptation
summary:
Ecosystem-based adaptation (EbA) supports the SDGs by enhancing resilience and justice and by using biodiversity and ecosystem services for climate adaptation.

headline: Organic manure purchases rise 3.5 times in Kharif 2026
summary: A big transformation appears to be underway in Indian agriculture as farmers increasingly adopt organic manure sources while the government simultaneously strengthens the country's fertiliser security architecture amid global uncertainty. headline: CM pushes natural farming, assures support to farmers
summary:
Chilakaluripet: Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu has strongly advocated natural farming, warning that excessive use of fertilizers and pesticides is damaging soil fertility, public health, and export prospects for agricultural produce.
